moonlit_cliffside.name: Moonlit Cliffside Vigil
moonlit_cliffside.role_title: solitary samurai keeping a moonlit vigil
moonlit_cliffside.wardrobe: worn battle kimono layered under a dark haori, one shoulder partially exposed, a katana sheathed at the hip
moonlit_cliffside.pose_action: standing at the very edge of a cliff, one foot on a jutting rock, robes billowing in the wind, gazing silently into the vast mist below
props: sheathed katana resting against the hip
loose strands of hair caught in the wind
moonlit_cliffside.environment: on a rugged cliffside overlooking a vast misty valley, ancient pine trees clinging to the rock face below, a full moon cutting through drifting clouds
moonlit_cliffside.lighting: Cold silver moonlight from above, deep shadows on the cliff face, a faint blue mist rising from the valley below.
moonlit_cliffside.mood: solitary, windswept, quietly powerful, and poetic

teahouse_scholar.name: Noble Scholar's Tea Room
teahouse_scholar.role_title: Edo-era scholar-noble at a private tea ceremony
teahouse_scholar.wardrobe: a richly layered formal kimono in deep indigo and grey, silk obi tied precisely, reading glasses perched low
teahouse_scholar.pose_action: kneeling upright at a low lacquered table, one hand lifting a ceramic tea bowl with practiced elegance, eyes studying an unfurled scroll beside it
props: unfurled scroll with ink calligraphy
ceramic tea bowl
low lacquered table
ink stone and brush
teahouse_scholar.environment: inside a refined tatami chamber with paper shoji screens glowing softly from outside lantern light, a hanging scroll painting visible on the wall
teahouse_scholar.lighting: Warm golden candlelight from a bronze lantern, soft shadows on the shoji screens, intimate and still.

sakura_storm.name: Cherry Blossom Storm
sakura_storm.role_title: wandering swordsman caught in a sakura storm
sakura_storm.wardrobe: a dark travel cloak over layered kimono, a wide kasa hat tied loosely, sandals on a mossy stone path
sakura_storm.pose_action: walking slowly through a storm of falling cherry blossoms, head tilted slightly upward, one arm extended with fingers open to catch petals, the other hand resting on a sheathed blade
props: sheathed katana at the hip
kasa hat strings loose in the wind
cherry blossom petals swirling around
sakura_storm.environment: beneath a massive ancient sakura tree on a stone garden path, petals falling so thickly they obscure the background, a stone lantern half-visible through the blossoms
sakura_storm.lighting: Diffused dusk light filtering through dense blossom clouds, soft pink-white glow, no hard shadows.
sakura_storm.mood: wistful, wandering, quietly melancholic, and hauntingly beautiful

castle_audience.name: Shogun's Audience Hall
castle_audience.role_title: high shogun receiving in the grand audience hall
castle_audience.wardrobe: full formal shogun attire — layered ceremonial kimono in black and gold, wide-shouldered kamishimo jacket, court hakama, ornamental daisho at the hip
castle_audience.pose_action: seated in a commanding upright posture on a raised wooden dais, one hand resting flat on one knee, the other gripping a closed iron war fan, gaze fixed forward with absolute authority
props: closed iron war fan held across the knee
ornamental daisho at the hip
silk banners flanking the dais
castle_audience.environment: inside a grand castle audience hall with towering wooden pillars, gold-leaf paneled walls, silk clan banners hanging from the rafters, polished dark wood floors stretching out below
castle_audience.lighting: Dramatic torch sconces on the pillars casting amber light, deep shadows behind the throne, the figure lit from above like a painting.

waterfall_shrine.name: Mountain Waterfall Shrine
waterfall_shrine.role_title: warrior-monk in meditation at a mountain waterfall
waterfall_shrine.wardrobe: simple monk's robes in earth tones — grey and rust, a prayer cord wrapped around one wrist, bare feet on wet stone
waterfall_shrine.pose_action: seated cross-paws on a flat mossy rock at the edge of a waterfall basin, paws resting on knees, eyes closed, perfectly still despite the mist and roar of the falls behind
props: prayer cord on the wrist
a single unlit stick of incense wedged in the rock beside
mist from the waterfall curling around the figure
waterfall_shrine.environment: at the base of a towering mountain waterfall, mossy boulders surrounding a clear pool, dense ancient forest on both sides, a small stone shrine marker half-covered in moss to one side
waterfall_shrine.lighting: Misty diffused daylight through forest canopy, soft cool whites and greens, the waterfall catching light and scattering it into fine spray.
waterfall_shrine.mood: serene, meditative, ancient, and deeply peaceful

midnight_lake_sake.name: Midnight Lake Sake
midnight_lake_sake.role_title: noble enjoying solitary midnight sake by a mountain lake
midnight_lake_sake.wardrobe: a loose informal kimono in deep teal, one sleeve slipping off the shoulder, hair loosely tied, elegant but unhurried
midnight_lake_sake.pose_action: seated on a flat mossy boulder at the water's edge, legs slightly extended, one elbow resting on a raised knee, a sake cup lifted toward the moon with languid ease
props: ceramic sake cup raised toward the moon
traditional sake flask on the rock beside
still water reflecting the full moon below
midnight_lake_sake.environment: beside a still mountain lake at midnight, the full moon perfectly reflected in the glassy surface, ancient pines silhouetted against the sky, absolute silence
midnight_lake_sake.lighting: Silver-blue moonlight across the water and figure, the reflection of the moon broken slightly by the figure's shadow, very cool and still.
midnight_lake_sake.mood: intimate, solitary, poetic, and quietly euphoric

inkstone_study.name: The Inkstone Study
inkstone_study.role_title: master calligrapher at work in a private study
inkstone_study.wardrobe: a formal scholar's kimono in deep charcoal with subtle pattern, sleeves rolled and held back with tasuki cord, ink stains on the fingers
inkstone_study.pose_action: leaning forward over a wide writing desk, brush held vertically in one hand mid-stroke on a large sheet of paper, other hand flat on the desk steadying the sheet, expression deeply focused
props: large calligraphy brush held mid-stroke
ink stone beside the paper
stacks of scrolls and books lining the walls behind
a single candle casting light on the work
inkstone_study.environment: inside a private study lined floor to ceiling with scrolls and books, a wide low writing desk dominating the center, late night, utterly quiet
inkstone_study.lighting: A single candle placed at the corner of the desk — warm amber light illuminating the paper and hand, everything else in deep shadow.
inkstone_study.mood: focused, disciplined, deeply absorbed, and quietly intense

stone_bridge_dusk.name: Stone Bridge at Dusk
stone_bridge_dusk.role_title: wandering ronin pausing on a river bridge at dusk
stone_bridge_dusk.wardrobe: worn travel kimono in faded brown over darker layers, a tattered haori, worn sandals, a katana loosely slung across the back
stone_bridge_dusk.pose_action: standing at the centre of the bridge, both arms resting on the stone railing, leaning forward to look down at the river below, face unreadable, still as the water
props: katana slung across the back
the stone railing worn smooth by years of hands
a paper lantern hung at the bridge entrance glowing amber in the dusk
stone_bridge_dusk.environment: on a narrow arched stone bridge over a wide slow river at dusk, autumn trees on the banks, their reflections broken into gold fragments on the dark water below, lanterns beginning to light in a village barely visible in the distance
stone_bridge_dusk.lighting: Deep orange-red dusk sky behind, the lantern warm amber ahead, the figure caught between two light sources, face in gentle shadow.
